text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm at the library, looking for some<n>materials
related to racing, when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wow... what a wonderful tale. I'd love<n>to make a
picture book out of a story<n>like this...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hello, Rice. So this is where you were.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hi, Bourbon. Did you need<n>something?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. A dire issue has come up—it<n>threatens to
exploit my vulnerabilities.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have been assigned to talk about<n>racing to the
children as part of<n>orientation...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am unfamiliar with such tasks, and<n>thus cannot
simulate a strategy to<n>successfully complete it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have deduced that you may know<n>the secrets
to carrying out this<n>function.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Umm... I'm not sure if I'll be any help<n>either...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Okay, why don't you tell me what you<n>already
have? Imagine I'm one of the<n>kids.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: A test run, you mean. Very well. I will<n>begin now.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...In brief, sturdy footwork and<n>muscular strength
are important for<n>acceleration.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That is all. How was that?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, I'm sorry... but it felt a little stiff to<n>me...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Stiff?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Is this better?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Umm... Your smile is cute and all, but<n>your speech
was the problem, not<n>your expression!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You should make it more fun and<n>easy to
understand since you're<n>talking to kids...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why not make a paper<n>slideshow
using little illustrations?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...A paper play?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I think the kids would have a fun time<n>listening to
you talk that way.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But I do not have any prior<n>experience producing
them, nor do I<n>have much time remaining.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Everything will work out just fine! I'll<n>pitch in too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You must really want everyone to<n>enjoy running.
Isn't that why you're<n>serious about this?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Strictly speaking, I am only following<n>orders... but
that is also part of it, yes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Then let's work hard on this together.<n>I want our
little friends to have fun<n>running too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I just know we can make a<n>wonderful
slideshow! Having a clear<n>goal builds motivation!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Motivation... Very well. I approve. We<n>will do this
for the children.
